data.description: Statement of the Yemeni Armed Forces regarding the execution of a qualitative military operation targeting Lod Airport in the occupied Jaffa area with a hypersonic ballistic missile type "Palestine2" 23-01-1447 AH 18-07-2025 CE

data.title: FLUENT Corp. to issue 2.75M shares to directors in exchange for $137,500 debt settling.
data.description: TAMPA, Florida, July 16, 2025 - FLUENT Corp., a prominent national cannabis brand, has disclosed the issuance of 2,750,000 common shares ("Debt Shares") to specific directors in return for the forgiveness of US$137,500 in director fees owed from April 1, 2025, to June 30, 2025. The board of directors of the Company previously authorized this transaction. The Debt Shares will be provided at the market closing price of US$0.05 per common share of the Company on the Canadian Securities Exchange ("CSE") on June 30, 2025, aligning with CSE regulations.

data.title: Tensions escalate between Trump and Powell over possible Fed Chair ouster; 20% chance by 2025, raising fears of global market impact.
data.description: Speculation is rife that President Donald Trump may fire Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell before his term ends in May 2026. This move has triggered concerns over central bank independence and the potential for a constitutional crisis. If Trump proceeds with this, it would be the first time in modern U.S. history that a president attempts to remove a Fed chair without cause. The probability of Powell being ousted by the end of 2025 stands at over 20%, the highest since April, on a CFTC-regulated prediction market platform. Trump was reported to have displayed a draft letter firing Powell during a meeting with House Republicans, raising political risks and unsettling global markets. This news has caused a stir in the financial community.

data.title: Matador Tech details CTO agreement with Antoine De Vuyst for designing Digital Gold Platform on Bitcoin.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Matador Technologies Inc. announced that Antoine De Vuyst has been appointed as the Chief Technology Officer and lead designer of the upcoming Digital Gold Platform on Bitcoin. This announcement follows the welcoming of De Vuyst on March 31, 2025. Matador Technologies Inc. (TSXV: MATA, OTCQB: MATAF, FSE: IU3) shared details of Mr. De Vuyst’s consulting agreement, as requested by the TSX Venture Exchange. This development signifies a significant step for the company in its technology leadership and product innovation.

data.title: Pyrophyte Acquisition Corp. II closes $175M IPO offering 17.5M units at $10 each, includes 1 share and 0.5 warrant.
data.description: In Houston, TX on July 18, 2025, Pyrophyte Acquisition Corp. II (NYSE: PAII) disclosed the completion of its initial public offering, which encompassed 17,500,000 units sold at a price of $10.00 per unit. These units contain one Class A ordinary share alongside half of a redeemable warrant, with each full warrant enabling the purchase of one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share.

data.title: KB Home opens new community in Bothell, WA - Camas Ridge, with modern homes suited for today's living. $KBH (NYSE)
data.description: In Bothell, Washington, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) unveils Camas Ridge, a fresh residential community. The leading US homebuilders introduce this project offering a mix of outdoor activities, local charm, and a lively city center. The homes cater to contemporary living trends, boasting modern kitchen setups flowing into spacious great rooms, along with roomy bedroom suites featuring walk-in closets. Camas Ridge aims to attract buyers seeking a balance between nature, community, and urban conveniences.
Trump initiates libel lawsuit against Dow Jones, News Corp, Rupert Murdoch, 2 WSJ reporters; complaint not yet public.

data.title: Midas Immersion Cooling introduces TCO calculator for data centers to compare savings of full-immersion vs traditional cooling methods.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on July 18, 2025, Midas Immersion Cooling introduced its Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Calculator. This tool allows data center operators to analyze and contrast the potential lifetime savings of utilizing full-immersion cooling as opposed to traditional rack setups.

data.title: D2E Labs names Karan Raturi from Wayfair as COO to boost Amazon agency growth. Strategic move for marketplace expansion.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Seattle, D2E Labs, a platform funded by private equity that focuses on enhancing performance-driven marketplace services, announced the appointment of Karan Raturi as their Chief Operating Officer. Raturi will be responsible for managing operations within the D2E Labs group, overseeing various market-related activities.

data.title: Charles Schwab, a major brokerage firm, plans to launch Bitcoin and Ethereum trading services for retail clients, said CEO Rick Wurster.
data.description: Charles Schwab (NYSE: SCHW), a leading brokerage firm in the U.S., is set to introduce trading services for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) for its retail customers. CEO Rick Wurster announced the plan during a CNBC interview, stating that the move is to meet the growing demand from clients who trust Schwab with their investments. Wurster mentioned that a considerable number of Schwab clients already possess a small allocation of these digital assets. This decision reflects Schwab's effort to cater to the evolving needs of its clientele, aiming to provide a comprehensive range of assets for investment.

data.title: Bitcoin’s dip leads traders to XLM, LTC, ETC, BNB as altcoin season potential spins attention.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently testing key support levels as the possibility of an altcoin season looms, capturing the attention of traders. Amidst this trend, XLM, LTC, ETC, and BNB are emerging as top choices for investors seeking alternative opportunities.

data.title: Ultragenyx granted 45,292 restricted stock units to 29 new non-executive officers as an inducement to join on July 16, 2025.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Novato, California, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: RARE) disclosed the issuance of 45,292 restricted stock units of the company’s common stock to 29 recently recruited non-executive officers. The allotments were sanctioned by the compensation committee of the company’s board of directors and distributed under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on July 16, 2025. This move served as a notable inducement for the new employees joining Ultragenyx as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Gray Media, Inc. closes $900M offering of 9.625% senior secured second lien notes due 2032, issued at par.
data.description: In Atlanta on July 18, 2025, Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) disclosed the successful closure of their recent offering. The company completed the issuance of $900 million in total principal of 9.625% senior secured second lien notes due 2032, known as the "Notes," which were sold at face value.

data.title: Bowen Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: BOWN) faces delisting from Nasdaq for non-compliance with listing requirements.
data.description: On July 15, 2025, Bowen Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: BOWN), a special purpose acquisition company based in New York, received a Delisting Determination Letter. This letter stated that BOWN's securities face delisting from the Nasdaq Global Market.

data.title: Brookfield Renewable plans to invest $1 billion to raise stake to 38% in Isagen S.A. E.S.P.
data.description: In recent news from Brookfield on July 18, 2025, it was disclosed that Brookfield Renewable (NYSE: BEP, BEPC; TSX: BEP.UN, BEPC) plans to boost its equity stake in Isagen S.A. E.S.P. by investing a significant $1 billion. This move will see Brookfield Renewable's ownership in Isagen rise to around 38%, showcasing a notable commitment to the energy sector.

data.title: Robot Consulting Co., Ltd. closes $15 million IPO on Nasdaq, offering 3,750,000 ADSs at $4 each, trading under "LAWR".
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Tokyo, Japan, Robot Consulting Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: LAWR), a Japanese company focusing on human resource solutions and intending to expand into legal technology and the metaverse, successfully closed its initial public offering. The offering consisted of 3,750,000 American Depositary Shares (ADSs) priced at US$4 per ADS. Each ADS represents one ordinary share of the company. The ADSs commenced trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market on July 17, 2025, under the symbol “LAWR.”

data.title: Delek US Holdings to host Q2 2025 earnings call on August 6, 2025. Results to be released before market opens. Call at 10:00 a.m. CT. Website for live broadcast: www.DelekUS.com.
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, will release its second quarter 2025 financial results before the U.S. stock market opens on August 6, 2025. The company plans to issue a press release on that day. A conference call is set to take place at 10:00 a.m. CT (11:00 a.m. ET) on the same day to discuss these results. The call will be live-streamed on Delek US's website at www.DelekUS.com. Stay tuned for further updates on the company's performance.

data.title: Gray Media, Inc. raises Revolving Credit Facility to $750 million and extends maturity to 2028.
data.description: Today, Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) based in Atlanta, disclosed that it has raised the total commitments for its Revolving Credit Facility by $50 million, bringing the total commitments to $750 million. Additionally, they have prolonged the maturity date from December 1, 2027, to December 1, 2028.

data.title: Radiate Holdco, LLC released its full year 2024 financial results on July 18, 2025, compliant with Indentures governing FLFO.
data.description: Radiate Holdco, LLC ("Radiate") from Princeton, N.J., disclosed its complete financial outcomes for the fiscal year 2024 through its secure investor portal on July 18, 2025. The results adhere to the terms outlined in the Indentures overseeing Radiate's FLFO.
